description: Create a transcription typing experiment in PsychoPy Builder simulating a standard Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) text entry study. Generate a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/phrases.csv with a 'target_phrase' column containing the phrases: "my watch fell in the water", "prevailing wind from the east", "never too rich and never too thin", "breathing is difficult", and "i can see the rings on saturn". Build the experiment at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/transcription_task.psyexp featuring a 'trial' routine inside a random loop linked to the conditions file. The routine must include a Text component displaying the $target_phrase variable, an editable TextBox component for user input, and a mechanism to end the trial when the 'return' key is pressed.

target_phrases: my watch fell in the water
never too rich and never too thin
i can see the rings on saturn
